name: Self-Improving
description: 3 meta subagents + monthly model + perf audits. Requires 30 days of subagent_runs data to be meaningful.

notes.smoke_tests: Artifact 4's tier-4 manifest included `psql_check_table_exists` smoke tests — that is not a real shell command and verify.sh runs smoke tests via eval, so it would fail. Dropped here; Supabase table creation is verified separately via the Supabase MCP at install time (see Tier 4 install log).
notes.schema_location: 002/003 create tables in the `stack` schema (stack.subagent_runs, stack.model_audits) for consistency with 001-cost-log.sql — Artifact 4 used bare public-schema names.

post_install_note: Tier 4 skills (model-audit, agent-performance-review) need ~30 days of cost_log and subagent_runs data to produce meaningful output. Set a calendar reminder for first run.
